template_data.sub: Past performance isn't the barrier to your first federal award. Your network is.
template_data.image_headline: PAST PERF IS NOT THE BARRIER.
template_data.image_prompt: Split-panel infographic. Left panel dark navy, bold red label 'WRONG PREMISE' with red X icon. Three short myth labels in white: 'No Past Perf', 'Can't Compete', 'Wait For Record'. Right panel white/cream, bold green label 'RIGHT MOVE' with checkmarks. Three action labels in dark text: 'Find Prime', 'Structure Agreement', 'Win Together'. Center vertical divider with illustrated professional in suit extending handshake across panels. Bold headline top: 'PAST PERF IS NOT THE BARRIER.' Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
